diff:
diff --git a/src/Carbon/Traits/Difference.php b/src/Carbon/Traits/Difference.php
index db5fe1d..55d590f 100644
--- a/src/Carbon/Traits/Difference.php
+++ b/src/Carbon/Traits/Difference.php
@@ -367,6 +367,37 @@ trait Difference
+    public function diffInBusinessDays($date = null, bool $absolute = false, array $holidays = []): int
+    {
+        $holidayStrings = array_map(...);
+        return $this->diffInDaysFiltered(
+            static fn (CarbonInterface $date) => $date->isWeekday() && !in_array($date->toDateString(), $holidayStrings, true),
+            $this->resolveCarbon($date)->avoidMutation()->modify($this->format('H:i:s.u')),
+            $absolute,
+        );
+    }

exploration_log.aha_moment: diffInWeekdays() is implemented as diffInDaysFiltered with an isWeekday() closure. diffInBusinessDays() is the same pattern with an extra !in_array($date->toDateString(), $holidayStrings) condition. The holiday dates just need normalizing to 'Y-m-d' strings before the closure.
exploration_log.hindsight: Look at diffInWeekdays() before implementing to understand the exact pattern including the avoidMutation()->modify() call for consistent time-of-day handling.

alternatives: Manual date loop counting business days
key_decisions.decision: Use diffInDaysFiltered() with an extended closure
key_decisions.reasoning: diffInWeekdays() uses this exact pattern; following it keeps code consistent and leverages CarbonPeriod iteration under the hood.

solve_notes: Added `diffInBusinessDays()` after `diffInWeekendDays()` in `Traits/Difference.php`, following the same pattern as `diffInWeekdays()`. The method normalises the optional `$holidays` array to `'Y-m-d'` strings and extends the `isWeekday()` filter with an `!in_array` holiday exclusion, delegating the actual counting to `diffInDaysFiltered()`.
task_text:
Add `diffInBusinessDays()` to Difference trait

The `Difference` trait in `Traits/Difference.php` provides `diffInDays()`,
`diffInWeekdays()`, and similar methods but not a business-day diff
that excludes weekends and configurable public holidays. Add
`diffInBusinessDays()` that accepts an optional array of holiday dates
and counts only Mon–Fri non-holiday days between two dates.

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum set covers the new method and the two methods it directly calls. The thrash_preventing set adds diffFiltered because an AI agent would read its implementation to confirm the closure signature and understand that EXCLUDE_END_DATE is already handled, preventing re-implementing the end-date boundary logic manually.
